# Reproducer derived from https://github.com/thtrieu/darkflow/issues/633
# repo: thtrieu/darkflow
# title: OverflowError: cannot convert float infinity to integer

# Last frames in traceback:
#   /home/ubuntu/anaconda3/envs/yolo/lib/python3.6/multiprocessing/pool.py line 266 in map
#   /home/ubuntu/anaconda3/envs/yolo/lib/python3.6/multiprocessing/pool.py line 644 in get
#   /home/ubuntu/anaconda3/envs/yolo/lib/python3.6/multiprocessing/pool.py line 119 in worker
#   /home/ubuntu/anaconda3/envs/yolo/lib/python3.6/multiprocessing/pool.py line 44 in mapstar
#   /home/ubuntu/darkflow/darkflow/net/yolov2/predict.py line 45 in postprocess
#   /home/ubuntu/darkflow/darkflow/net/yolo/predict.py line 28 in process_box

# Minimal repro (conceptual):

def repro():
    # Conditions described in the issue:
    # Hi,
    # I am facing below issue when trying to run the test.
    # Forwarding 6 inputs ...
    # Total time = 7.751178503036499s / 6 inps = 0.7740758386159626 ips
    # Post processing 6 inputs ...
    # Traceback (most recent call last):
    # File "/home/ubuntu/anaconda3/envs/yolo/bin/flow", line 6, in <module>
    # exec(compile(open(__file__).read(), __file__, 'exec'))
    raise OverflowError('reproduce: see https://github.com/thtrieu/darkflow/issues/633')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    repro()
expected_fix_hint: Use Decimal or math.inf handling; pre-scale values.
